## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Security hardening

## Validation

- [ ] `go test ./...` (agent)
- [ ] `go vet ./...` (agent)
- [ ] `flutter analyze` (app)
- [ ] `flutter test` (app)
- [ ] Manual validation performed (if needed)

## Docs Impact

- [ ] No docs changes needed
- [ ] Updated relevant docs
- [ ] Updated `docs/FUTURE.md` / `docs/KNOWN_ISSUES_AND_LIMITATIONS.md` where applicable

## Notes

Include rollout concerns, known risks, or follow-up tasks.
